name: zero-offline-agent-sample
description: Small offline fixture suite for exercising Zero coding-agent scoring contracts without live provider calls.

tasks.name: Document verify JSON contract behavior
tasks.description: Docs-only task for verify and selfverify JSON contracts.
tasks.prompt: Update the stream-json protocol documentation so maintainers can see how `zero verify --json` reports verification events. Keep the wording honest and do not change runtime code.

tasks.name: Tighten npm wrapper smoke guidance
tasks.description: Docs-only task for npm wrapper validation guidance.
tasks.prompt: Improve the npm wrapper smoke checklist so a maintainer can distinguish Go release checks from direct Node wrapper checks. Do not add Node build dependencies.

tasks.name: Add provider catalog validation coverage
tasks.description: Focused test task for model registry catalog stability.
tasks.prompt: Add focused tests for provider catalog defaults so model aliases and provider display names remain stable. Keep the change inside the model registry package.
